mapper.sql: notice_no, title, content, category, important_yn, view_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice
(title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT FROM notice WHERE notice_no > #{noticeNo} ORDER BY notice_no ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM notice WHERE notice_no < #{noticeNo} ORDER BY notice_no DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, category, important_yn) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, COALESCE(#{importantYn}, false))
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, important_yn = COALESCE(#{importantYn}, false), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
UPDATE notice SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice ORDER BY important_yn DESC, notice_no DESC LIMIT #{limit}
